title: centaurea × valentina subsp. albuferae
intro: Centaurea × valentina subsp. albuferae, also known as Valerian Centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × valentina subsp. albuferae include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as relieving muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
